entry.title: IDC 47QFLA19D0006 (P00010) awarded to VIASAT, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE CATALOG LIST FOR CHANGES TO EXHIBIT A AND L TO ADD THE REQUIRED SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENT AND UPDATE SECTION C CLAUSES.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:subcontractPlan.description: PLAN NOT INCLUDED - NO SUBCONTRACTING POSSIBILITIES
